title: Gospel of Truth
goal: Accuracy-first translation prep that preserves poetic theology and Valentinian terminology.

cross_reference_strategy.notes: Use XII.2 overlap to illuminate damaged or uncertain places in I.3.

primary_witnesses.notes: Primary Coptic facsimile witness from Nag Hammadi Codex I, tractate 3. full Codex I page span (16-43) sourced via the Gospels.net manuscript page and fetched from Claremont CCDL image records. OCR completed 2026-04-22 via Vertex-backed Gemini 3.1 Pro using a fixed crop box (0.16,0.03,0.84,0.97) and 6-band page assembly. Interior pages are clean; page 16 and page 43 remain the natural boundary edge-cases.
English translation / interpretation witness only; not a Coptic-script primary source. Primary online Coptic/translation witness for the complete I.3 copy.

primary_witnesses.coverage_label: Approximate overlap: Book of the Living (seg 004), Return to Unity (seg 005), Parable of the Jars (seg 006), Coming into Being (seg 007)
primary_witnesses.notes: Fragmentary XII.2 overlap witness for damaged or uncertain stretches of I.3. OCR completed 2026-04-22 with 100% Coptic-letter coverage on every fragment. Per-fragment segment mapping + text paths in the OCR job file.

guardrails: Preserve reified Valentinian terms where flattening them would erase the theology.
When XII.2 materially clarifies I.3, mark that repair explicitly instead of silently blending the witnesses.
Do not naturalize the text into generic devotional English.
